description: Create a multisensory Simultaneity Judgment (SJ) task in PsychoPy Builder where participants judge if a flash and beep occur at the same time. Generate a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/soa_conditions.csv containing columns 'soa_offset' and 'corrAns' with at least 5 rows of offsets ranging from -0.3 to +0.3 seconds (assign 'y' for 0 offset and 'n' otherwise). Save the experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/av_simultaneity.psyexp. The experiment must include an instructions routine and a trial routine within a loop (nReps=1) linked to the conditions file. The trial routine requires a 0.1s visual stimulus starting at 0.5s, a 0.1s sound stimulus with a variable start time of 0.5 + soa_offset, and a keyboard response accepting 'y' or 'n' that records the correct answer.
